title: coleus unguentarius
intro: Coleus unguentarius, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coleus unguentarius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health. Herbal preparations of Coleus unguentarius can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including skin infections and respiratory problems.
